$schema_note: Machine-readable DCU/HIP optimization method registry. Hygon tensorcore paths are HCU/MMOP/MMAC-specific; AMD MFMA guidance is analogy only unless dccobjdump confirms Hygon MMAC ISA. Source-backed HCU builtins are candidates only with exact signatures and target compilation.

compute.mmac_tensor_core.name: HCU MMOP / MMAC matrix core utilization
compute.mmac_tensor_core.reference_impl: CK Tile HCU GEMM/conv/attention path, source-backed HCU/AMD-named MMAC builtin with exact signature, or target-compiled inline asm; final proof is v_mmac/MMOP ISA

compute.mixed_precision_fp8_bf8.name: gfx938 FP8/BF8/TF32 mixed precision
compute.mixed_precision_fp8_bf8.reference_impl: compiled CK Tile low-precision path or source-backed gfx938 FP8/BF8 conversion/MMAC forms from paged_attention_938.cu when tolerance permits
compute.mixed_precision_fp8_bf8.typical_speedup: 2-4x when memory and matrix math benefit

compute.launch_config_wave64.name: Wave64 launch and tile geometry
compute.launch_config_wave64.reference_impl: block sizes as multiples of 64; tune occupancy with LDS/VGPR pressure

compute.thread_coarsening.name: Thread coarsening / register tile
compute.thread_coarsening.reference_impl: per-thread multiple elements, register tiles, fixed-loop unroll

compute.register_pressure_control.name: VGPR/SGPR pressure control
compute.register_pressure_control.reference_impl: scalarize local arrays, reduce live ranges, tune __launch_bounds__, avoid spills

compute.fast_math_intrinsics.name: Fast math / intrinsic replacement
compute.fast_math_intrinsics.reference_impl: HIP fast math intrinsics or reciprocal/multiply transforms with explicit tolerance

compute.inline_asm_builtin.name: Inline asm / low-level escape hatch
compute.inline_asm_builtin.reference_impl: small asm volatile or source-backed builtin only after higher-level paths fail and a minimal target compile probe passes

memory.coalesced_access.name: Coalesced global memory access
memory.coalesced_access.reference_impl: contiguous wavefront lanes; SoA or hot-dimension-contiguous layout

memory.vectorized_global_access.name: Vectorized global load/store
memory.vectorized_global_access.reference_impl: aligned float2/float4 or packed global load/store operations

memory.aligned_layout_transform.name: Layout / stride transform for locality
memory.aligned_layout_transform.reference_impl: hot-dimension-contiguous layout, aligned strides, direct target-layout writes

memory.global_to_lds_async.name: Direct global-to-LDS / async buffer load
memory.global_to_lds_async.reference_impl: CK Tile loader, buffer_load_* lds, or source-backed __builtin_amdgcn_raw_buffer_load_lds wrapper with address_space(3) LDS destination
source_backed_impls: __builtin_amdgcn_raw_buffer_load_lds(rsrc, address_space(3) int* dst, size, voffset, soffset, imm, auxiliary)
memory.global_to_lds_async.typical_speedup: 1.1-3x when staging overhead or register pressure dominates

memory.matrix_load_mls.name: CK Tile MLS / tile staging
memory.matrix_load_mls.reference_impl: target-compiled CK Tile/HCU MLS path or source-backed HCU matrix-load examples
source_backed_impls: __builtin_hcu_matrix_load_32x16_b16(rscr, address_space(3) short* dst, offset, t, r, sw, flags)
__builtin_hcu_ds_read_matrix_trans_format_u16(address_space(3) short* src, lds_offset, row, col, alt)

memory.ds_read_matrix_layout.name: DS matrix-read layout contract
memory.ds_read_matrix_layout.reference_impl: compiled inline asm ds_read_m32x16_b16, ds_read_m32x16_b16_alt, or ds_read_m32x32_b8; source-probe ds_read_m32x64_b4 / ds_read_m32x8_b32 before use
memory.ds_read_matrix_layout.typical_speedup: required for robust HCU MMAC feed path

memory.lds_bank_conflict.name: LDS bank-conflict reduction / swizzle
memory.lds_bank_conflict.reference_impl: padding, XOR/Morton swizzle, matrix-read-aware LDS layout

memory.cache_policy_glc_slc.name: Cache policy / coherency modifiers
memory.cache_policy_glc_slc.reference_impl: glc/slc flags in Hygon/AMD buffer/global memory operations when justified

memory.ck_tile_named_pipeline.name: CK Tile named pipeline selection
memory.ck_tile_named_pipeline.reference_impl: TLS, MLS, WASP, cshuffle, wavelet, persistent, split-k, preshuffle, dsreadm

memory.epilogue_fusion.name: Epilogue / post-op fusion
memory.epilogue_fusion.typical_speedup: 1.1-2x or more when removing a full memory pass

latency.waitcnt_pipeline.name: Waitcnt-aware software pipeline
latency.waitcnt_pipeline.reference_impl: overlap global/LDS loads with compute; s_waitcnt vmcnt/lgkmcnt near consumers

latency.reduce_barrier.name: Reduce barriers and sync scope
latency.reduce_barrier.reference_impl: remove unnecessary __syncthreads; use wave-level patterns when legal

latency.wavefront_shuffle_ds_bpermute.name: Wavefront exchange/reduction via shuffle or DS permute
latency.wavefront_shuffle_ds_bpermute.reference_impl: ds_permute_b32 / ds_bpermute_b32 or HIP shuffle/cooperative groups

latency.ilp_unroll.name: ILP, loop unrolling, and schedule fill
latency.ilp_unroll.reference_impl: pragma/manual unroll, interleave independent arithmetic and address work

latency.persistent_scheduler.name: Persistent or work-queue scheduler
latency.persistent_scheduler.reference_impl: CK Tile persistent/grouped GEMM or custom work queue

latency.split_k_streamk.name: Split-K / Stream-K parallelism
latency.split_k_streamk.reference_impl: split K into partial sums, tune combine/reduction, stream-K for skinny/irregular shapes

latency.salu_valu_phase_balance.name: SALU/VALU phase balance
latency.salu_valu_phase_balance.reference_impl: hoist scalar address math, precompute invariants, fill empty scheduling phases

latency.sqtt_stall_triage.name: SQTT stall triage
latency.sqtt_stall_triage.typical_speedup: diagnostic, not a source edit by itself

coupled_methods.note: HCU MMAC correctness depends on the matrix-read/LDS layout contract.
Matrix-load staging may be part of the same HCU MMAC feed-path change.
CK Tile HCU paths may already implement MMAC; avoid double-counting.
MLS must be paired with correct s_waitcnt/lgkmcnt scheduling; count once if same code delta.
Bank-conflict work refines LDS tiling; select both only when analysis separates deltas.
Both can be alternative loader paths; compare as branches rather than blindly stacking.
Both address underfilled grids; choose based on whether work is irregular or K-parallel.

unsupported_assumptions: Do not assume AMD MFMA mnemonic names are sufficient Hygon tensorcore evidence.
Do not add FP4 hardware methods for current Hygon DCU targets without new toolchain/hardware evidence.
Do not use CUDA warp32 reduction patterns without wave64 review.
Do not trust __has_builtin alone for HCU builtin support; compile a source-backed minimal call and inspect final ISA.
Do not invent HCU builtin signatures from AMD names or spreadsheet rows without a source-backed call site.
